results.title: Nautis Launches AI-Native Startup Operating System ...
results.content:
VMPL

Mohali (Punjab) [India], July 13: Built in India for founders worldwide, Nautis unifies strategy, fundraising, finance, operations, hiring, compliance, CRM, documentation and AI into one connected platform.

The explosion of AI-powered business software has made startups more productive, but it has also created a new operational challenge: founders now spend significant time switching between disconnected applications, repeating information across AI assistants, and manually connecting workflows that were never designed to work together. Today, Nautis announced the public launch of what it calls an AI-Native Startup Operating System, a new category of software designed to replace fragmented startup tools with one intelligent operating platform. [...] Founder Profile

Baltej Singh is the Founder & CEO of Nautis. Over the past 16 years, he has built software products, launched multiple startups and worked alongside founders, incubators and accelerators across diverse startup ecosystems. Through building his own ventures and supporting hundreds of founders, he observed the same recurring challenge: entrepreneurs were spending more time managing software than building companies. That insight led to the creation of Nautis, an AI-Native Startup Operating System designed to unify startup operations into one intelligent platform.

@thomas_jack4Thanks, really appreciate that! That was exactly our thinking. Founders shouldn't have to rewrite the same information again and again. The generated business plan is fully editable, so you can change sections, add your own insights, adjust the tone, and refine everything before sharing it. We see AI as a starting point, not the final output.

@himani_sah1Thanks! Our AI Chief of Staff looks at what actually needs a founder's attention, not just what's new. It prioritizes things like missed deadlines, low runway, pending approvals, investor follow ups, important meetings, and blockers that could slow the team down. The goal is simple: help founders start the day with clarity instead of spending the first hour figuring out what needs attention.

AI-Native, Not AI-Sprinkled

## Intelligence built into the foundation, not bolted on top

Most tools added a chatbot. Nautis was rebuilt around AI that reads your whole business, does real work across every module, and shows its receipts.

### Your AI Chief of Staff

Every morning, Nautis reads your metrics, pipeline, inbox, and calendar — then briefs you on what changed, what's at risk, and what to do first. Listen to it as audio on your commute. [...] Clear direction. Confident decisions.

Make the switch

### Ready to experience the"After"?

Nautis doesn't change the founder. It changes the structure around them — so you can focus on building.

Setup in under 5 minNo credit card required1,000+ founders

Our clients love working with us, just read what they have to say.
